---
title: "Methodology"
author: "Elsen Soh, Gloria Phua, Jaxsen Tee"
---

\## Data Sources\
\
Describe the datasets used in this project.\
\
\## Analytical Approach\
\
Explain how your team used visual analytics to investigate the case.\
\
\## Tools and Techniques\
\
State the tools used, such as Tableau, Quarto, GitHub, and Vercel.
